posts.title: Startup Mentor Checklist
posts.summary: Startup Mentor Checklist: Mentors can be invaluable to a founder to act as a sounding board for ideas and planned action. They can also play the role of devil’s advocate, challenging your own thinking. A mentor can help you prioritize, since you will tend to feel overwhelmed. Mentors may have suggestions about ways of doing […] The post Startup Mentor Checklist appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
